creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Since last few days I noticed that amavisd-new scans slowed down. It takes 5 minutes to scan single e-mail. How can I pinpoint the source of the problem? First thing that comes to mind is recent clamav update, but as this is production system I would rather not test by disabling it.

Here's typical log line (private details redacted):

Mar 31 18:58:08 mx1 amavis[32516]: (32516-03) Passed CLEAN {RelayedInbound}, [192.0.2.102]:54752 [192.0.2.97] ESMTP/LMTP <sender@example.org> -> <recipient@example2.org>, (ESMTPS://[192.0.2.102]:54752 < ESMTPA://192.0.2.97), Queue-ID: 90D034221001, Message-ID: <1459443186.56fd55f2b36c0@swift.generated>, mail_id: InaVtMqxkYht, b: uwmlIwC0I, Hits: -0.371, size: 295207, queued_as: 455314221009, Subject: "Some Subject", From: <prijave+106956@example.org> (dkim:AUTHOR), helo=mail1.example.org, Tests: [RCVD_IN_DNSWL_MED=-2.3,RCVD_IN_SORBS_HTTP=0.001,RCVD_IN_SORBS_SOCKS=1.927,TIME_LIMIT_EXCEEDED=0], autolearn=unavailable, autolearnscore=2.642, relaycountry=RS_**_**_**_RS, dkim_i=@example.org, dkim_sd=E8919A20-A27A-11E3-A5B2-8AF65E4206AF:example.org, 300525 ms
